propositions: Build a re-runnable gate-eval instrumentation job that refreshes the outcome corpus via subprocess invocation of the miner and classifies each reviewed ticket's outcome.
Implement a deterministic first-match classifier cascade over outcome-corpus fields plus a has_strong_finding sidecar predicate, yielding CAUGHT-BUT-IGNORED, UNKNOWABLE, MISSED, or N/A.
Document the load-bearing finding that a classifier over sidecar findings alone reaches only 4/8 while the outcome-corpus-based cascade reaches 7/8 (overfit 8/8 rule deliberately excluded).
Form a deduplicated union of findings across all retained review rounds so persistent findings count once and cleared earlier blocks are not omitted.
Emit finding-level per-criterion trailing metrics (blocking_fp_proxy, advisory_application_rate, rounds_per_ticket, sample_counts) over a windowed corpus.
Document an alarm/demotion playbook where blocking_fp_proxy above 10% triggers human review and demotion to advisory, citing the T5e precedent (not T3/T10).
